===={{aniseries|JN}}====
Drayden reappeared in ''[[JN065|Thrash of the Titans!]]'', meeting Ash and [[Goh]] when they arrived at the Opelucid Gym for Ash's [[World Coronation Series]] battle against Iris. When they entered the Gym, Drayden surprised Ash by revealing that Iris had become the {{pkmn|Champion}} of [[Unova]]. He then joined Goh in watching the battle.

In ''[[JN117|The Fiery Road to Mastership!]]'', Drayden was shown watching Iris's [[Masters Eight Tournament]] match against {{an|Cynthia}}.
